message:
chore(raptorq): bump dual-policy-probe schema v2 to v3 and correct closure signoff track statuses

- Update run_raptorq_e2e.sh: validate_dual_policy_probe_contract now
  expects schema_version "raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v3" in both
  the grep filter and jq structural validation
- Update raptorq_perf_invariants.rs: track_e_dual_policy_probe_contract_
  surface_tokens assertion matches v3 schema
- Correct closure signoff packet: Track G (governance aggregation) and
  Track H (finalization/sign-off) status corrected from "in_progress"
  back to "open" as upstream closure dependencies are not yet satisfied

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@
       "track_code": "G",
       "track_bead_id": "asupersync-2cyx5",
       "required_status": "closed",
-      "current_status": "in_progress",
+      "current_status": "open",
       "status_reason": "Track-G final governance aggregation is still in progress and blocks final sign-off.",
       "closure_dependency_path": "direct",
       "evidence_refs": [
@@ -128,7 +128,7 @@
       "track_code": "H",
       "track_bead_id": "asupersync-p8o9m",
       "required_status": "closed",
-      "current_status": "in_progress",
+      "current_status": "open",
       "status_reason": "Track-H finalization/sign-off remains open until upstream closure dependencies are fully satisfied.",
       "closure_dependency_path": "direct",
       "evidence_refs": [

@@ -309,7 +309,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
     echo ">>> [bundle] ${stage_id}: ${stage_desc}"
     start_s="$(date +%s)"
 
-    grep '"schema_version":"raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v2"' "$stage_log" >"$contract_log" || true
+    grep '"schema_version":"raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v3"' "$stage_log" >"$contract_log" || true
     if [[ ! -s "$contract_log" ]]; then
         status="fail"
         rc=1
@@ -318,7 +318,7 @@ validate_dual_policy_probe_contract() {
     elif ! jq -s -e '
         length >= 7 and
         all(.[];
-            .schema_version == "raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v2" and
+            .schema_version == "raptorq-track-e-dual-policy-probe-v3" and
             (.scenario_id | type == "string" and length > 0) and
             (.seed | type == "number" and . >= 0 and floor == .) and
             (.mode | type == "string" and length > 0) and
